name: Up and Down

setup.description: Drop 5 balls just off the green in a mix of lies — rough, fringe, light rough. From each, chip or pitch it on, then putt out. Play 3 rounds and record your best round.

rules.description: Play each ball as its own up-and-down: one short-game shot to get on, then finish it out on the green.
scoring: 2 points for a chip holed directly
1 point for a chip followed by a holed putt (up-and-down)
-1 point if you need more than one putt after the chip
Play 3 rounds of 5 balls; record your best round

caption: The shot that saves rounds — hole it, save it, or lose a point. Five lies, best of 3 rounds. #golfable #golftok #golfpractice #loweryourhandicap
